member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.BasePlugin.AddComponent``1
member.summary: Add a Component (e.g. MonoBehaviour) into Unity scene. Automatically registers the type with Il2Cpp Type system if it isn't already.
member.typeparam: Type of the component to add.

member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.IL2CPPChainloader.AddUnityComponent``1
member.summary: Register and add a Unity Component (for example MonoBehaviour) into BepInEx global manager. Automatically registers the type with Il2Cpp type system if it isn't initialised already.
member.typeparam: Type of the component to add.

member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.IL2CPPChainloader.AddUnityComponent(System.Type)
member.summary: Register and add a Unity Component (for example MonoBehaviour) into BepInEx global manager. Automatically registers the type with Il2Cpp type system if it isn't initialised already.
member.param: Type of the component to add

member.name: E:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.IL2CPPChainloader.PluginLoad
member.summary: Occurs after a plugin is instantiated and just before is called.

member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.MetadataDumper.TryFindDecryptedMetadataHeader(System.Int64,System.IntPtr@,System.Int64@)
member.summary: 在满足强特征的 region 里，扫描前100字节找到 header magic，并返回 headerAddress（而不是 region base）。

member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.MetadataDumper.TryFindMetadataHeaderViaCodePattern(System.Int64,System.IntPtr@,System.Int64@)
member.summary: Fallback 方法:通过搜索代码模式来定位 metadata header 地址。 搜索 "48 89 ? ? ? 57 48 83 EC ? E8 ? ? ? ? 48 8B ? 48 89", 然后从找到的地址+0x12处解析 mov 指令获取目标地址。

member.name: M:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.MetadataDumper.DumpDecryptedGlobalMetadata(System.String)
member.summary: Dump decrypted global-metadata.dat from memory into targetPath. 注意：从 headerAddress 开始 dump（会跳过 region base 到 magic 的前置字节）。

member.name: T:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.ModernProgressBar
member.summary: Modern custom progress bar with gradient and smooth animations

member.name: T:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.GraphicsExtensions
member.summary: Graphics extension methods for rounded rectangles

member.name: T:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.Il2CppProgressWindow
member.summary: Progress window for Il2Cpp Interop generation

member.name: T:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.Il2CppProgressLogger
member.summary: 自定义 Logger，用于捕获 Il2CppInterop.Generator 的日志消息并更新进度窗口

member.name: T:BepInEx.Unity.IL2CPP.Il2CppProgressLoggerProvider
member.summary: 自定义 LoggerProvider，用于创建 Il2CppProgressLogger

member.name: M:Doorstop.Entrypoint.Start
member.summary: The main entrypoint of BepInEx, called from Doorstop.
